free_text: A study of the nuclear structure of 46Ti by the
45Sc(3He,d) reaction
Department of Physics
Institute for Nuclear Study
Department of Physics
Department of Physics
Beam intensity is 0.2 uA.
[EN-RSL] FWHM
- Target is natural.
- Chemical-form of target is oxide powders. Sc2O3.
- Physical-form of target is solid.
- Target-thickness is 0.85 mg/cm2. Deposited onto the
backing.
- Backing is mylar film. 6-u Myler backing
INS cyclotron
E-RSL: Uncertainty in determination of the mean
excitation energy.
Deuterons were analyzed with a broad-range
magnetic spectrograph.
Deuterons were detected with 100-u SAKURA M1
nuclear emulsions.
The errors involved in the absolute cross
section due to the uncertainties of the
thickness and nonuniformity of the target.
No information on source of uncertainties
DWBA (Distorted wave Born approximation)
V.D
